body: ``` /claude https://github.com/link-assistant/agent/pull/267 ``` ``` ✅ Work Session Completed 📊 Session: 0431ae12-a67a-419b-9f93-9b0480736d29 ⏱️ Duration: 11m 2s 🔗 URL: https://github.com/link-assistant/agent/pull/267 🔒 Isolation: screen The work session has finished. You can now review the results. ```` is changed too much from ``` /claude https://github.com/konard/anime-avatar/issues/19 —model opus ``` ``` ⏳ Solve command executing... 📊 Session: 3fe0b5b3-1d4c-45d7-b3b9-95b23bec7158 🔒 Isolation: screen Requested by: @drakonard URL: https://github.com/konard/anime-avatar/issues/19 🛠 Options: --model opus --tool claude 🔒 Locked options: --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats --auto-attach-solution-summary --isolation screen ``` The second issue is just an example. So instead of ``` ✅ Work Session Completed 📊 Session: 0431ae12-a67a-419b-9f93-9b0480736d29 ⏱️ Duration: 11m 2s 🔗 URL: https://github.com/link-assistant/agent/pull/267 🔒 Isolation: screen The work session has finished. You can now review the results. ```` We should get: ``` ✅ Work session finished successfully ⏱️ Duration: 11m 2s 📊 Session: 3fe0b5b3-1d4c-45d7-b3b9-95b23bec7158 🔒 Isolation: screen Requested by: @drakonard URL: https://github.com/link-assistant/agent/pull/267 🛠 Options: --tool claude 🔒 Locked options: --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats --auto-attach-solution-summary --isolation screen ``` Also double check we correctly track/monitor and display fail of working session. We reason we need all these is security, at the moment it is critical to keep track of who executed what in telegram, as we don't have any other database. And user can delete his message, so ``` Requested by: @drakonard URL: https://github.com/link-assistant/agent/pull/267 ``` are mandatory. And ``` 🛠 Options: --tool claude 🔒 Locked options: --attach-logs --verbose --no-tool-check --auto-accept-invite --tokens-budget-stats --auto-attach-solution-summary --isolation screen ``` Can be kept traditional for debug. So only ``` ✅ Work session finished successfully ⏱️ Duration: 11m 2s ``` will be changing. Also double check that we will properly display the case when starting of the command will fail. Also we should show two different events - starting the command (immediately) and executing. ``` 🔄 Starting... ``` ``` ⏳ Executing... ``` So it will be clear, that first we starting the command itself, and it may fail before executing, and once if successfuly started we go to `⏳ Executing...`. We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions). If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration. If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code.
title: Better UI/UX for /solve commands in telegram bot
